purpose: B3.0 layout contract: tinygrad decode KV layout the owned AMDGCN tile must read

K.order: kv-head major, then position, then head-dim

V.order: kv-head major, then position, then head-dim (same as K)

tinygrad_layout.gqa_mapping: q-head h in [0,32); kv-head kvh = h // G = h // 4; within group g = h % 4; h = kvh*G + g
tinygrad_layout.valid_positions: n_valid = start_pos (number of valid KV positions); positions [0, n_valid) attended, T=1 decode

K.order: position major, then kv-head, then dim: K[pos][8 kv-heads][128]
K.note: nb11=Hkv*Hd*2=2048 -> all 8 kv-heads of a position are contiguous

llama_ggml_layout_from_b2.difference: tinygrad is KV-HEAD major (each kv-head's positions contiguous); llama is POSITION major (each position's kv-heads contiguous). Owned kernel reads tinygrad layout -> kv-head's K/V is one contiguous [MAXC,Hd] block, naturally coalesced per warp.

stop_condition: NOT triggered -- layout is fully described from the existing winner kernel; no model surgery needed.
owned_kernel_reads: K[kvh*MAXC*Hd + t*Hd + d], V same, Q[h*Hd + d], out[h*Hd + d]; all fp16 in / fp32 out; scale 1/sqrt(128)
